title: Ten Days Before the Straw Hats Arrived
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on ten days before the straw hats arrived within the Ten Days Before the Straw Hats Arrived storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: He's the Duke of our mokomo dukedom... in other words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's this country's king... when the city was destroyed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He fell into a coma along with it and has been that way ever since...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This country has two kings.

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: THE KING OF DAY, [DUKE INUARASHI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: AND THE KING OF NIGHT, [MASTER NBKO- MANUSHI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: CA- PTAIN ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: DRAG drag

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Have they arrived yet...?! The sun is already setting....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: UU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's unbelievable ...to think you really defeated Doflamingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Captain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That was all Mugiwara-ya's doing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've got a lot catch up on, so let's head deeper into the forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Right belly fort...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It happened half a month ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: In

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: 17 Days Ago, to be precise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: About a month and a half since Bepo and his crewmates arrived...

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: [Vister Bells] rang out across our mokomo Dukedom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: However, they weren't the "Bells of Welcome"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But the one that shouldn't have rung at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It was the [RAID BELL]...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They tore through our forest and marched onwards, advancing on our peaceful city!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: With the unusual heavy rumblings everbert- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Through the ground, "Zuneshaa" roared out...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I ask you this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If a fierce- some enemy comes demanding something of us that we do not possess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: How are we supposed to give it to them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Now then... Bring him forward! We know he's here...

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: The Warrior of Wano Kingdom, "RAIZOU" ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Trampling forth is an overwhelming "giant evil"!!!

summary: Ten Days Before the Straw Hats Arrived: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
